name: publish-preflight
description: Example declarative extension that scaffolds a static-publish preflight using supported publish metadata, sidebar widgets, link checks, and safe Markdown transforms.

permissions.reason: Reads local publish frontmatter, headings, links, tags, and checklist state already available to Forge.
Writes bounded publish-page scaffolding, table-of-contents, heading cleanup, and callout transforms into the current note when requested.

contributes.label: Publish preflight metadata
contributes.description: Declares fields useful for Markdown preflight notes before running the CLI or Settings static-site publisher.

contributes.label: Publish checklist
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported publish checklist sidebar widget for readiness review.

contributes.label: Properties
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported frontmatter widget for publish fields and review state.

contributes.label: Outline
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported outline widget for page-structure review.

contributes.label: Link health
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported link-health widget for unresolved wikilinks before publishing.

contributes.label: Append preflight scaffold
contributes.description: Declares the validator-supported append-template transform for adding a Markdown preflight report scaffold.

contributes.label: Normalize publish headings
contributes.description: Declares the supported heading cleanup transform for publish pages.

contributes.label: Insert generated table of contents
contributes.description: Declares the supported table-of-contents insertion transform for longer publish pages.

contributes.label: Wrap preflight caveat as callout
contributes.description: Declares the supported callout transform for warnings, caveats, and release notes.
